title: ammannia coccinea subsp. longifolia
intro: Ammannia coccinea subsp. longifolia, also known as red ammannia, is a plant species belonging to the family Lythraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ammannia coccinea subsp. longifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
